examples: He spoke in a haughty tone.
You appear haughty, too much and you are inquisitive.
The present Catherine has no other likeness to her, except a breadth of the forehead and a certain arch of the nostril that makes her appear rather haughty.
And for that reason his attitude toward the rest of the Golden Hearts was somewhat haughty.
Until now, all the haughty talk of a full-length feature film was just that.
